no-restricted-syntax.message: Call mascot.setState('idle') instead of mascot.idle() directly so the DOM sentinel is always updated.

no-restricted-imports.name: @playwright/test
no-restricted-imports.message: Import from tests/e2e/_fixture.ts instead to ensure testHooks=1 is auto-injected

no-restricted-syntax.message: Engine code must consume a Clock port (src/engine/ports.ts) via DetectorContext — direct Date.now() breaks deterministic replay. See PLANS/forensic-deep-dive-2026-05-01.md §1.5 / Phase 4.4.

Engine code must consume an IdGenerator port (src/engine/ports.ts) via DetectorContext — direct crypto.randomUUID() couples to the host runtime and prevents test-time fixtures. See PLANS/forensic-deep-dive-2026-05-01.md §1.5 / Phase 4.4.
Engine code must inject a seedable Rng port (src/engine/ports.ts) — direct Math.random() breaks determinism and replay. See PLANS/forensic-deep-dive-2026-05-01.md §4.2.
